feed.title: Kazi Ehsan Aziz
feed.subtitle: Developer Blog is a software development quickbook and diary for Kazi Ehsan Aziz.

entry.title: Jekyll, Chirpy and the Github Pages

link.title: Jekyll, Chirpy and the Github Pages

entry.summary: Github Pages lets you host Jekyll sites and Chirpy makes it even easier. Photo by Florian Bernhardt on Unsplash Prerequisites Make sure to have Ruby installed. On Mac: moncefbelyamani’s tutorial. On Windows https://rubyinstaller.org/ Steps Create a new repository from the Chirpy Starter and name it <GH_USERNAME>.github.io if you want to host with Github Pages at https:/...
